stories.headline: Anthropic discusses new custom chip with Samsung
synopsis: Anthropic is discussing a new custom chip with Samsung, about a week after OpenAI announced its own custom AI chip in a partnership with Broad

stories.explanation: Imagine a brain, where custom chips are like specialized neurons, making the brain work more efficiently.
